attempts.test_code:
import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_find_first_in_sorted_duplicates():
    """Test finding first occurrence in sorted array with duplicates."""
    # Test case from the hint: [3, 4, 5, 5, 5, 6], target=5 → expected 2
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 5, 5, 6]
    x = 5
    expected = 2  # First occurrence of 5 is at index 2
    result = source.find_first_in_sorted(arr, x)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected first occurrence of {x} at index {expected}, got {result}"
    
    # Additional test: edge case where target is at beginning
    arr2 = [1, 1, 2, 3, 4]
    x2 = 1
    expected2 = 0
    result2 = source.find_first_in_sorted(arr2, x2)
    assert result2 == expected2, f"Expected first occurrence of {x2} at index {expected2}, got {result2}"
    
    # Test case where target not found
    arr3 = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    x3 = 6
    expected3 = -1
    result3 = source.find_first_in_sorted(arr3, x3)
    assert result3 == expected3, f"Expected {expected3} for non-existent value, got {result3}"
